name: Mountain Herb Picking
quest-details: I want to pick some of this village's famous Mountain Herbs for my brother in town, but there are too many monsters! Could you please go out for me and bring back 5 Mountain Herbs?

name: An Anteka in the Snow
quest-details: In the Eastern lands, it is said that an Anteka's antlers are good for one's health. I would like to test this proverb. Please acquire 3 of these antlers for this purpose.

name: Hunt the Carnivore!
quest-details: HELP! The children are being attacked by small, white monsters called Giaprey! 5 of the beasts are outside! Do something! Please! Think of the children!

name: Sinking Feeling
quest-details: As usual, I went into the mountains on my hunt for Popos; however, today they were frightened and fled to the summit. Something must be up there... Please get the Popo Tongues for me!

name: Slay the Blangos!
quest-details: Whew! That was incredibly scary! On my walk up the mountain road, some Blangos began to chase me! I think they are still up there, so please slay them quickly!

name: The Carnivorous Leader
quest-details: It seems that I can trust you with a difficult job like this. I'd like you to hunt down the leader of a Giaprey pack, the Giadrome. I wish you a beautiful victory in our defense!

name: Gathering - Snowy Mountains
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the snowy mountains. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Gathering - Jungle Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the jungle. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Gathering - Desert Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the desert. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: The Carnivorous Leader
quest-details: It seems that I can trust you with a difficult job like this. I'd like you to hunt down the leader of a Giaprey pack, the Giadrome. I wish you a beautiful victory in our defense!

name: Reckless Bulldrome Hunter
quest-details: My son decided to become a hunter and ran off after a Bulldrome on his own! Of course, now the tables have turned and I'm worried! Hunt down the Bulldrome on the snowy mountains!

name: Slay the Giaprey!
quest-details: I chased off a Giaprey that was feeding on my Popos, but now it's back with 19 of its buddies! I can't take on the whole lot of them! Hunters, this is your chance! Please get rid of them for me!

name: The Pack of Blangos
quest-details: I request that you slay the Blangos rampaging through the mountains... A Bulldrome was also spotted in the area. Successfully avoid the Bulldrome and go about your mission.

name: The Taboo of Negligence!
quest-details: The Mountain Herb, one of the seven sacred mountain flowers, truly captures the spirit of the mountains. There shouldn't be any wyverns in this weather, so you may gather with ease.

name: Hunt Down the Velocidrome!
quest-details: It seems that whenever my wife goes to pick mushrooms in the Jungle, a large carnivore appears! There's no way I can let her go pick mushrooms now... Please! Make the Jungle safe again!

name: Jungle Menace
quest-details: I want you to hunt and kill the giant bird-like monster that has appeared in our jungle. It's wreaking havoc on our environment and must be stopped!

name: Rarest of the Rare Beasts
quest-details: Do you know of a pink, fanged beast that roams the jungle? That beast has dirtied my shop beyond hope! It's impossible to clean up! Get rid of it before I'm soiled again!

name: Hunt the Rare Forest Congas!
quest-details: I took a trip to the jungle and saw some beautiful pink animals with fangs. But when I tried to pet them from my carriage, the beasts made a stink on me! I can't get it off! Punish those meanies!

name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
quest-details: My village is under attack by a swarm of bug monsters! It seems there are about 20 of them. One on one they are not a threat, but as a group they are deadly. So be careful.

name: Collect to Combine
quest-details: An affinity towards combining is important, but so are fresh raw materials! Special Mushrooms from the jungle are sure to improve your hunting life and wallet! Gather 10 of them!

name: Hunt the Gendrome!
quest-details: My caravans are being hit by packs of Genprey. It appears there is an extraordinarily powerful boss among them! Hunt down the monster and make the roads safe again for all!

name: The Land Shark
quest-details: Our pack-animals were eaten by something in the desert. But nobody actually saw the monster attack! Track down this vile beast and take it out!

name: Liver of Legend!
quest-details: Hello sirs and madams! I deal in rare items that I find in the desert. Recently I've got a buyer for Piscine Wyvern and Sand Wyvern livers. Deliver 3 of them to me!

name: Gone Fishin'
quest-details: Fishing. It carries on in the hearts of children and remains a simple pleasure for adults. Hearken back to a simpler time and bring me back 2 of the desert's most precious gift... Goldenfish!

name: Shadow in the Snow
quest-details: If it's not one thing, it's another, right? Near the village, a strange flying wyvern called a Khezu has been spotted. It is strong, but I believe you can handle it. Do your very best!

name: Gathering - Swamp Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the swamp. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Gathering - Forest and Hills
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the forest and hills. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Shadow in the Snow
quest-details: If it's not one thing, it's another, right? Near the village, a strange flying wyvern called a Khezu has been spotted. It is strong, but I believe you can handle it. Do your very best!

name: The Subterranean Glutton
quest-details: I'm after the rare larvae of the Khezu. They should be on the summit, so search there. These whelps aren't to be taken lightly. If you run out of Pickaxes, combine a bone with a rock!

name: Blango Slaying Tactics
quest-details: The pelt of a Blango can be made into various pieces of armor that are useful in everyday life. Slay 10 of the beasts and bring me their pelts. Beware of the Giadrome.

name: Aim for the Jungle Crab
quest-details: I've always longed to go hunting in the jungle! However, if a huge monster appeared, I'd be finished! Maybe you could take out the Daimyo Hermitaur for me?

name: Master of the Giant Lake
quest-details: Hunt down the water wyvern that keeps harassing my shipyard! Your target is a monster covered in green scales that is more powerful than its cousin! Heh heh!

name: A Swarm of Hermitaurs
quest-details: Fishing is no easy endeavor, but lately things have gotten out of hand! While unloading my ship, a swarm of Hermitaurs appeared. Slay 10 of them and let me get on with my work!

name: The Purple Poison Menace
quest-details: I saw a gigantic bird-like monster deep in the jungle! It scared everyone so bad that I can't do business with a thing like that out there! Please hunt it down so I can work in peace!

name: The Lurking Desert Giant
quest-details: When some of my clan went gathering in the desert, they were attacked by an enormous crab, nya! As long as he's around, we can't do business. Help us, nya!

name: Water Wyvern in the Desert
quest-details: I found a giant water wyvern in a cave in the desert! I can't defeat it because it stays underwater. Slay it for me and the glory is all yours!

name: Slay the Genprey!
quest-details: I'm too injured to go on... The Genprey living in the desert have the power to paralyze their foes. I'd like you to find the pack that did this to me and kill 20 of the fiends!

name: Gypceros: Venomous Terror
quest-details: The fields all around the town are getting torn to shreds by a gigantic poisonous bird-like monster. Exterminate it for us! Its poison can melt crops, so be careful it doesn't melt you!

name: Attack of the Blue Kut-Ku
quest-details: That big eared Yian Kut-Ku really made mincemeat out of me! It's out of my league, so I want you to hunt it down for me! He's all yours!

name: The Mischief-maker
quest-details: I took a trip to the swamp and saw a pretty pink animal with fangs. But when I tried to call it to the carriage, it threw something dirty at me and now I can't get the smell off! Punish it!

name: Fang of the Iodrome!
quest-details: My village is under attack by a pack of Ioprey. Inside their pack, they are led by an incredibly large boss with poison filled fangs. Slay this creature for us!

name: Slay the Great Kut-Ku!
quest-details: A bird-like Yian Kut-Ku is attacking people the world over! It has even shown up in these very hills! If it isn't eliminated soon, we're finished! Show me what you're made of!

name: A Killing from Mushrooms
quest-details: Prices on mushrooms from the forest and hills have skyrocketed. Please gather 10 of them for me and I'll cut you in on the profits! But beware of the Kut-Ku rumored to roam the area.

name: The Ruler of the Snow
quest-details: My next request requires a true master... Care to test yourself? I'd like you to hunt down the chief of the snowy mountains. Remember, on this quest negligence is unforgivable.

name: Gathering - Volcanic Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the Volcanic Belt. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: The Ruler of the Snow
quest-details: My next request requires a true master... Care to test yourself? I'd like you to hunt down the chief of the snowy mountains. Remember, on this quest negligence is unforgivable.

name: Red Shadow in the Swampland
quest-details: I've always longed to venture into the swamp! I think I could hunt down a Kelbi, but I could never fight a wyvern. Maybe you'd take care of this special monster for me...

name: The Lone Black Garuga
quest-details: A Yian Garuga has been spotted in the jungle and there is now a vigorous search on for this atrocious beast. It has downed many a hunter, so take care as you hunt it!

name: Twin Velocidrome
quest-details: 2 Velocidrome and their brood have long been menacing this area. Please destroy the two Velocidrome to disperse the pack and return peace and quiet to the jungle!

name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
quest-details: My plantation's under attack by giant bugs! They nest in the jungle, in a swarm of about 20. Take care of them for me!

name: Battle of the Blos
quest-details: This is a request to the virtuous hunters of Pokke. A Monoblos is tearing through the desert near my village of Kokoto. Please hunt it down for us!

name: The Silver Horn
quest-details: I beseech you for help! An old enemy has cut our hunters down to the last man... I fled to tell you that the silver horned White Monoblos terrorizes us once again! Rid us of it!

name: Supreme Ruler of the Swamp
quest-details: Hunters! It is time to hunt down the Shogun Ceanataur. Let us rid the swamp zone of this menace and expand our strategic possibilities. This is a highly classified hunt. So don't tell a soul!

name: Trapped by Yian Kut-Ku
goal-condition: Hunt the Yian Kut-Ku and Blue Yian Kut-Ku
quest-details: The Yian Kut-Ku are circling, screaming in their shrill voices. Everyone is trapped inside the town! Please do something!

name: The Ioprey Leader
quest-details: We were just in a fight with a pack of Ioprey, but were routed and had to retreat before we could defeat their leader. Hunt it down for us, but beware of its poison attacks.

name: Basarios: Unseen Peril
quest-details: A wyvern attacked my team from out of the blue while we were on an expedition to the Volcanic Belt. Where did it come from? Please slay it!

name: Commander in the Flames
quest-details: Upon our trip into the cave at the volcano, an enormous Shogun Ceanataur dropped down from the ceiling right on top of us! Its ambush caused massive damage! Rid the world of that scourge!

name: Ioprey Hunting
quest-details: While mining for ore, we encountered a huge Ioprey nest deep inside our tunnel! We can't continue working unless you kill 20 of them for us!

name: A Band of Ceanataurs
quest-details: I wanted to keep digging in search of the ultimate treasure trove... But some Ceanataurs smashed my Pickaxe! If you don't get rid of them, there will be no digging for me! Help me!

name: More Coal Please
quest-details: We need Coal to power our ambush spear cannon. Go to the Volcanic Belt and mine the reserves there! If you're worried about Pickaxes, combine a long cylindrical bone and a rock.

name: The Frozen Dictator
quest-details: I saw it! I saw it! In the middle of a blinding snow storm, there it was; dark black wings were dancing in the sky... No mere human could stand up to it! Don't even think of hunting it!

name: The Elder Dragon of Wind
quest-details: There was surely a vortex inside of that downpour. The wind wrapped around and revealed Kushala Daora! I don't foresee anyone defeating it. Weaken it and then drive it away!

name: Hermitaur Buffet
quest-details: I went to open up the little arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that a band of Hermitaurs have turned it into their home! Now I need your help to turn them out!

name: Absolute Power
quest-details: The Tigrex, said to be an ancestor of today's wyverns, has finally made an appearance. With such a powerful beast on the loose, the village is not safe. Hunt it down at once!

name: The Legendary Kirin
quest-details: That must have been the phantom beast... The faint glow, and how it seemed to glide over land... There's no doubt that amazing riches await its slayer!

name: Two Roars in the Snow
quest-details: It happened in an instant... Two Blangongas destroyed all the trees around my house. Now all I want to do is hunt them down so I can get my revenge. Please help me!

name: The Poison Siege
goal-condition: Hunt the Gypceros and Purple Gypceros
quest-details: Two poisonous fowl have appeared in the jungle. With them there, the jungle flowers will surely wilt and die! Go kill them... Now!

name: The Tigrex's Roar
quest-details: I have an urgent request from a hunter on an expedition in the desert! It seems he has encountered the mighty Tigrex! Go to his aid and crush this beast at once!

name: The Runaway Diablos
quest-details: A giant wyvern smashed the border-wall and ran into this area. We need to find and kill it before it causes any more trouble!

name: The Fierce Black Horn
quest-details: I had hired the most skilled hunters imaginable, and went on a safari for the famed Diablos... But what we found was no mere Diablos! We must slay that black horned wyvern! No matter what!

name: Ultimate Crab Dinner
quest-details: I am a true connoisseur of crab cuisine, and as such a connoisseur, I suspect the Daimyo Hermitaurs found in the desert are incredibly tasty! One is never enough, so hunt down two!

name: Black Rock in the Swamp
quest-details: Even in the relative calm of the swamp zone, something has stirred up the monsters. In particular, heavily armored wyverns have been attacking us. Can you help us out?

name: Seeking the Strange Mask
quest-details: This is awful! The princess saw some strange masked monsters that made her run for the hills! We're sending troops on a hunt for the fiends, so track down the masked marauders!

name: Terror of the Gravios
quest-details: A fearsome Gravios has appeared amidst the magma and desolation of the Volcanic Belt. Hunt down the fire breather for us!

name: Check the Ancient Tower
quest-details: A relic of olden days, the ancient tower is now off-limits. Those examining it should beware the danger posed by the Remobras. They must be defeated before entering the tower!

name: The Empress's Blazing Throne
quest-details: We've received a communique from headquarters. An elder dragon has appeared in the Volcanic Belt. Fight the dragon and collect data on its behavior!

name: Overseer of the Ancients
quest-details: Near the forbidden ancient tower, the Lunastra, empress of the elder dragons, is building a nest. Hunters! Who among you can defeat this ancient beast!? Exhibit your true skills!

name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
quest-details: Our intuition told us to turn around, but we thought no one was there... Yet even though no one should've been there, we were attacked from behind! Beware! It was an enemy never before seen!

name: Towards the Silence
quest-details: It seems an unknown elder dragon has appeared in the swamp zone. However, no one truly got a clear look at it. What could the beast have been? Slay it, but proceed with caution!

name: Small Shadow over the Swamp
quest-details: I was gathering mushrooms in the Swamp when a Khezu appeared, but it was no ordinary Khezu. What was so different about it? You'll know as soon as you see it!

name: Congalala Territorial Fight
quest-details: Two Congalalas have started a territorial fight over the Swamp. If they're not stopped soon, it'll ruin commerce in the area! Please hurry and put an end to their dispute!

name: A Troublesome Pair
quest-details: A pair of fire wyverns have taken up residence in the hillside. If you are able to hunt them by yourself, you are truly a top class hunter. Care to try your luck?

name: A Troublesome Pair
quest-details: A pair of fire wyverns have taken up residence in the hillside. If you are able to hunt them by yourself, you are truly a top class hunter. Care to try your luck?

name: Dual Plesioth
goal-condition: Hunt the Plesioth and Green Plesioth
quest-details: The water wyvern known as Plesioth is raging in the jungle. And not just one of them! Head off immediately to slay them!

name: Pink Dance in the Jungle
quest-details: I've always longed to be a hunter, but a meeting with a Rathian ended that! Now that I know what it takes, I'll start over, but you have the spirit to hunt down that Rathian!

name: Four Horns
goal-condition: Hunt the Diablos and Black Diablos
quest-details: I simply can't bear to think about the terror and pain those Diablos are causing my people. I can't sleep at night with that worry! Hunt down those 2 Diablos for me!

name: Emperor of Flame
quest-details: I have an earnest request of you... I want you to fight the elder fire dragon we cornered in the Volcanic Belt! Weaken it with your repeated counterattacks and then finally slay the beast!

name: A Sun with Fangs
quest-details: While in the secluded desert village, I spotted an elder dragon with red scales! While I do know some hunters, it would be wrong to make this request of them... So it's up to you!

name: The Shogun's Encampment
quest-details: Hey! Hey! Have you heard the news!? There's a rumor that two enormous monsters with thick shells have appeared in the Volcanic Belt! There must be a hunter somewhere who can face them!

name: Attack of the Rathalos
quest-details: It cannot be... We tried so hard to kill it... But... My entire war band was wiped out by a wyvern. Now it all rests upon your shoulders, monster hunter! Slay it!

name: A State of Crisis!
goal-condition: Defend the Town from Shen Gaoren
quest-details: Gather, bold hunters! You are the lynchpin of our national defense! A menace creeps towards this town. You must repel this monster and defend the fort.

name: The Final Invitation
quest-details: There are two Rajang, each with golden fur. Hunters, I have prepared a special stage for your grandest performance. Demonstrate your true power... He he he...

name: A Giant Dragon Invades!
quest-details: A giant dragon has attacked our fort! If the fort falls, so too do our lands! Use its installed weaponry to make this beast pay for its indiscretions!

name: Secret Request: Hypnocatrice
quest-details: I told my mother that I wanted a hat adorned with a Hypnocatrice's tail feather, but she got mad and said I was being selfish. Therefore this is a secret request. You must tell no one, OK!?

name: Bullfangos in the Night
quest-details: A Bulldrome and its pack are going hog-wild around a mining point for Ore. I don't want others to find that secret location, so please hunt them in secret for me.

name: Whack a Shakalaka
quest-details: I went to open up the little arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that it's been taken over by a group of strange, little... things! Now I need your help to take them out!

name: Carnivore Carnival
quest-details: I went to open up the little arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that it's been turned into a meat-lover's paradise! Please bring an end to their partying!

name: The Beating of Royal Wings
quest-details: It's no use. No matter where I look, I can't seem to find the Vespoid Queen! Perhaps if you slayed a large number of Vespoids to make her feel that her swarm was in grave danger, she might appear...

name: Secret Request: Hypnocatrice
quest-details: I told my mother that I wanted a hat adorned with a Hypnocatrice's tail feather, but she got mad and said I was being selfish. Therefore this is a secret request. You must tell no one, OK!?

name: The Burning Dunes
quest-details: There is a gigantic Cephadrome here in the Old Desert. There are numerous casualties and a state of emergency has been declared. We're calling on all hunters everywhere to please help!

name: Stealing in the Old Swamp!
quest-details: That Gypceros stole my very important Book of Combos, and then, right after that, a band of Melynx stole my BBQ Spit! At this rate, I'm going to be forced into early retirement! Heeeeelp!

name: The Purple Poison Menace
quest-details: I saw a gigantic Gypceros lurking deep in the swamp! It scared everyone so bad that I can't do business with a thing like that out there! Please hunt it down so I can work in peace!

name: Target: Basarios
quest-details: Off the record, I want you to hunt the Basarios down. You can tell the Guild that you failed and then sell the materials you get wholesale. Hmm? Oh no, this is a real request from the Guild...

name: Old Jungle Lightning
quest-details: Just when I thought that maybe this time the peace would last, this happens! As long as that Khezu just sits there, we can't get out of the Old Jungle. Please, come to our rescue, hunter!

name: Red Shadow in the Snow
quest-details: I've always longed to venture into the Snowy Mountains! I think I could hunt down an Anteka, but I could never fight a wyvern. Maybe you could take care of a special monster for me...

name: Congalalas' Assault
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A large number of Congalalas are congregating in the Swamp and I want you to hunt them down. You must get rid of at least 2 of those horrid things for me. I won't accept any less!

name: The Meeting of Daimyo
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: Help! There has been an explosion of so many Daimyo Hermitaurs near our fishing grounds that we can't handle things by ourselves! Get rid of as many as you can so we can get back to fishing!

name: Epic Hunt in the Jungle!
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: So I hear a Yian Kut-Ku and a Daimyo Hermitaur are in the Jungle. Sounds like a job for me! Don't worry, if you fail I'll mop them up for you. You can count on it!

name: Secret Request: 2 Monoblos!
goal-condition: Hunt the Monoblos and the White Monoblos
quest-details: An ancient wall painting our country was researching was destroyed by a Monoblos, and as an art-lover, I won't stand for it! My father can't spare any soldiers, so you're my only hope!

name: The Remobra Den
quest-details: I went to open up the big arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that it's been turned into a Remobra nest! Please, I need you to help me clear them out!

name: The Sleepy Great Forest
quest-details: I got a request to hunt some Hypnocatrices, but I have so many other things to do that I can't handle it all. Can you handle it in my stead, please? ...But please keep this a secret, OK?

name: Eyes in the Underground Lake
quest-details: We've received a rescue request from a poacher out hunting the Plesioth of the underground lake in the Old Desert. We ask that you please hold the Plesioth off while we rescue the person.

name: Green Waves of Verdure
quest-details: Help! I've received word that a Green Plesioth has appeared along our Queen's route to another land. Please take care of it in secret for us before she enters the area!

name: Elegy for a Lone Wolf
quest-details: Phew... I barely made it out alive from that Yian Garuga. I'll tell you what. You keep it a secret and I'll let you know where you can find this sly, cool-headed beast. Have we got a deal?

name: Battle with the Monoblos
quest-details: This is a request to the virtuous hunters of Pokke. A Monoblos is tearing through the desert near my village of Kokoto. Please hunt it down for us!

name: Secret Request: 2 Monoblos!
goal-condition: Hunt the Monoblos and the White Monoblos
quest-details: An ancient wall painting our country was researching was destroyed by a Monoblos, and as an art-lover, I won't stand for it! My father can't spare any soldiers, so you're my only hope!

name: Kut-Ku Calamity!
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: Aaaah!! A Kut-Ku here and a Kut-Ku there! The hillside is covered in a confusion of red and blue! We don't care if you have to get rid of them one at a time, but please, just do it!

name: Basarios Season
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: I was hiding from a Basarios behind some boulders when it turned out to be another one! I thought I could hide behind some other boulders ahead of me, but it was yet another one! Somebody, help!

name: A Shogun Tastes Like...?
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: I've had the pleasure of tasting some exotic foods in my social circles, and I'm afraid I've grown fond of Shogun meat. They're experiencing a population boom, so what better timing?

name: Bl-Bl-Blangongas!
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: My request is this: Please hunt down a few Blangongas in a row! The beasts are too hard for the hunters of my village, so please keep this a secret and spare their pride. Good luck!

name: Operation Desert Winds
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: We've received word that an airship made an emergency landing in the Desert, but a Monoblos often walks through the area, and the desert lake is home to a Plesioth. Please hurry to the hunt!

name: Congalala in a Crab Shell
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: I spotted that Congalala I ran into last time fighting ferociously with Mr. Crab in the Swamp. I don't want anyone else to suffer as I have, so please do something about them both!

name: Sleepy Miasma, Poison Mist
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: The Jungle is naturally foggy, but this time, there was something unusual in the air. As it turned out, it's the fault of two monsters in particular. I wonder if you could hunt them down for us?

name: Carnivores of the Old Jungle
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Recently, travelers through the Old Jungle have been disappearing... and we'd like for you to look into this. We believe this to be the work of monsters, but we would like confirmation.

name: Attack of the Wind Dragon
quest-details: A brown Kushala Daora is rapidly closing on the town. Scouts report that outlying areas have already been razed. If we don't stop this dragon, our town will be annihilated! We need you!

name: Indigo Meteor
quest-details: A perfectly clear desert night sky opened up and she descended down upon me... Her form was that of a breathtaking shooting star. Surely, I am to be her king. Come, she mustn't escape me!

name: The Empress's Blazing Throne
quest-details: We've received a communique from headquarters. An elder dragon has appeared in the Volcanic Belt. Fight the dragon and collect data on its behavior!

name: Lao-Shan Lung Draws Near!
goal-condition: Defend the Fortress from Lao-Shan Lung
quest-details: It seems that once again our land is in crisis. The giant elder dragon Lao-Shan Lung is approaching the village from the mountains. Head to the fort and defend our way of life!

name: Secret Request: Nargacuga!
quest-details: I couldn't sit by while the Nargacuga hurt our people, so I snuck out to go slay it... and failed. I can't face my father like this, so please defeat it for me in secret!

name: Secret Request: Nargacuga!
quest-details: I couldn't sit by while the Nargacuga hurt our people, so I snuck out to go slay it... and failed. I can't face my father like this, so please defeat it for me in secret!

name: Assassin of the Jungle
quest-details: Our head drill sergeant was attacked while out on an expedition in the Old Jungle by an unknown assailant. We think it's probably a monster, but we require the assistance of a hunter!

name: Land of the Tremors
quest-details: We're the Mysterious Duo, able to silence even the crying of kids! Normally, the Tigrex is nothing to us, but our stomachs are acting up a bit today, so help us out...? Owahahaha! Hahaha!

name: A King, Robed in Smoke
quest-details: Unbelievably, the king of all wyverns has appeared in the Old Volcano belt. To protect our temple, we went to fight it, but to no avail. Please, we humbly ask for your assistance, hunter!

name: Dancing Desert Queen
quest-details: Wow, nothing like a hunting ground to get the blood pumping and the spirit ready for the hunt! Unfortunately, while I've been gone, the requests have been piling up. Can you lend me a hand!?

name: Descendants of the King
goal-condition: Hunt the Azure Rathalos and the Pink Rathian
quest-details: The azure sky-king and the pink, earthly queen. Whoever successfully hunts them both shall be known as the King of Hunters. I await your return with a glass held high!

name: Diablos, the Demon King
quest-details: Ah, I tried to slay it, but I was in way over my head. Still, I can't let it go, so I ask that if you have the courage to face this beast, to please step forward.

name: The Four Spires
quest-details: I saw four black towers rising up on the dunes... I know what I saw! It was no dream, but reality! Please, save the Old Desert Town and my two dear daughters from those menaces!

name: Armored Supremacy
quest-details: Even us knights can't stand up to the Gravios's mighty heat ray. I know this is a big request, but can you please go and hunt this armored beast in our stead?

name: Two Black Suits of Armor
quest-details: All of the hunters who have taken on this request have fallen one by one, until there was no one left who would even consider it. 'Tis lamentable, no? Is there no one who has the guts to try?

name: Explore the Unexplored
quest-details: I'll tell you about a secret hunting ground, I will. It doesn't matter if it's day or night, the silver sun always shines, giving would- be hunters a good workout... Heh, heh, heh...!

name: A Single Beam of Moonlight
quest-details: We were dazed and lost in a haze for days when we came upon a mysterious land. There, we spied a golden moon. If I tell you the location, will you look into the area for me in secret?

name: Fire Ring, Lunar Ring
goal-condition: Hunt the Silver Rathalos and the Gold Rathian
quest-details: A gold- and silver-colored wyvern have taken over the area our village was going to develop. We'd like to keep this area a secret, even from hunters we know, so we're counting on you!

name: Attack of the Rajang
quest-details: Wahaha! It is I, the Mystery Man! I came here to drive the Instructor's Rajang crazy and to hinder the progress of his students! So, come on, take my job! It can be our secret. Wahaha!

name: It's Electric
quest-details: There's something causing lightning strikes in the heart of the Old Jungle. My theory is that this is proof that the mythical beast has come out of hiding. Isn't it absolutely fascinating?

name: Diamond Dust
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Recently, the weather around the Snowy Mountains has been bad nonstop. Further, the monsters are hungry from a lack of food, and have started to violently attack each other. Please help us!

name: Hard-Shelled Terrors
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: The princess has run off by herself to dig up some jewels in the Volcano! If someone were to find out, it would cause a huge stink. We haven't a moment to lose. Please set out at once!

name: Bird Wyvern All-Stars
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: I absolutely hate birds. I hate their voices, their beaks, their eyes -- every- thing! And just my luck, 3 bird-like monsters live right next to my house. ARGH! Please help me!

name: Sand Dune's Might
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: The scorching sands reveal a Monoblos while a Daimyo surfaces from underground and the roar of a Rathian echoes overhead. This isn't a request, but a warning. If you head out, return safely!

name: Evaporate into the Night
quest-details: People think it's impossible to fight an enemy you cannot see, however, if one were to focus and "see" with your gut instinct... Well, if all else fails, just swing your weapon round and round!

name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
quest-details: Our intuition told us to turn around, but we thought no one was there... Yet even though no one should've been there, we were attacked from behind! Beware! It was an enemy never before seen!

name: A Midnight Audience
quest-details: The Teostra's hideaway can only be found during the darkest hour, but I have done it. Now, if you can keep a secret, I'll tell you where it is, and of course you will be well rewarded...

name: Fight for Your Life!
quest-details: The Town is under attack from the Teostra! Casualties are high and it's only a matter of time before the town falls. We'll pay you whatever you ask; just hurry to their aid!

name: The Approaching Gaoren
goal-condition: Defend the Fortress from Shen Gaoren
quest-details: Hmm... This is quite serious. The fort which lies at the heart of our defenses is under siege by a giant monster. We need your strength to hold our position!

name: Monster Hunter
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: I'm overjoyed at the chance to see a hunter as skilled as yourself. I sense that should you complete this final quest, you will come to know the true meaning of a hunter's life!

name: Rise to the Summit
quest-details: We finally have the mighty Akantor cornered in the Volcano, but our forces are exhausted and there is mass confusion. Please, I humbly request that you secretly slay the beast for us!

name: A True Foe - The Giadrome!
quest-details: Within a group of the sly carnivorous Giaprey, there is a leader. They call it the Giadrome. I need a hunter's strength to show that pack of beasts and their leader who's boss!

name: Reckless Bulldrome Hunter
quest-details: My son decided to become a hunter and ran off after a Bulldrome on his own! Of course, now the tables have turned and I'm worried! Hunt down the Bulldrome on the snowy mountains!

name: A Pack of Blangos
quest-details: A large pack of Blangos are massing nearby. They are violent enough that a large group will quickly become uncontrollable. Please slay 15 of the apes!

name: Mountain Herb Picking
quest-details: I want to pick some of this village's famous Mountain Herbs for my brother in town, but there are too many monsters! Could you please go out for me and bring back 20 Mountain Herbs?

name: Rarest of the Rare Beasts
quest-details: Do you know of a pink, fanged beast that roams the jungle? That beast has dirtied my shop beyond hope! It's impossible to clean up! Get rid of it before I'm soiled again!

name: Hunt the Rare Forest Congas!
quest-details: I took a trip to the jungle and saw some beautiful pink animals with fangs. But when I tried to pet them from my carriage, the beasts made a stink on me! I can't get it off! Punish those meanies!

name: A Mushroom Goldrush!
quest-details: Mushrooms from the jungle are skyrocketing in price! If you were to gather 20 of them for me, you would be justly compensated. However, I hear the area is infested with carnivores, so beware!

name: The Land Shark
quest-details: A villager was tracking a pack of monsters, but lost sight of them in the desert. Please find the leader of the pack and hunt it down for us.

name: The Giant Enemy Crab
quest-details: A giant crab is wandering around the desert! However, no normal sword is capable of cracking its shell! I hate to ask for help from other hunters, but please lend me your skills!

name: The Lady Gourmet
quest-details: I travel the world for new tastes and flavors. Now I want to try the liver of a Piscine Wyvern, a taste few others have experienced. Please bring me 8 of these livers!

name: The Shadow in the Mountains
quest-details: We were exploring a snow-covered mountain near here, but stumbled on this disgusting blob-like monster! If you can't get rid of that thing, our research is doomed! Help us!

name: The King of the Mountains
quest-details: A Blangonga has staked its claim to a piece of the snowy mountains. Now we can't enter the area to gather firewood. Exterminate the Blangonga!

name: A Swarm of Hermitaurs
quest-details: Fishing is no easy endeavor, but lately things have gotten out of hand! While unloading my ship, a swarm of Hermitaurs appeared. Slay 10 of them and let me get on with my work!

name: Water Wyvern in the Desert
quest-details: I found a giant water wyvern in a cave in the desert! I can't defeat it because it stays underwater. Slay it for me and the glory is all yours!

name: Gypceros: Venomous Terror
quest-details: The fields all around the town are getting torn to shreds by a gigantic poisonous bird-like monster. Exterminate it for us! Its poison can melt crops, so be careful it doesn't melt you!

name: Supreme Ruler of the Swamp
quest-details: Hunters! It is time to hunt down the Shogun Ceanataur. Let us rid the swamp zone of this menace and expand our strategic possibilities. This is a highly classified hunt. So don't tell a soul!

name: Slay the Great Kut-Ku!
quest-details: A bird-like Yian Kut-Ku is attacking people the world over! It has even shown up in these very hills! If it isn't eliminated soon, we're finished! Show me what you're made of!

name: Eliminate the Rathalos!
quest-details: I request the assistance of only the bravest of hunters to find and hunt the Rathalos that has appeared near here. Of course, a handsome reward will be paid upon success.

name: Attack of the Rathian
quest-details: My caravan was wiped out by the queen of the skies, the killer Rathian! I'll pay you whatever you ask if you hunt down that foul creature! Help me kind hunter, you're my only hope!

name: Gathering - Snowy Mountains
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest on the snowy mountains. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Gathering - Jungle Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the jungle. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Gathering - Desert Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the desert. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Giadrome Assault
quest-details: After you killed those Giaprey, their leader showed up and it's not a happy camper! It's bigger, and has a green crest. Find it and kill it!

name: The Mountain Roughrider
quest-details: The thick skinned Bulldrome is well adapted to life in the mountains. Yet it's nothing but a pest for those of us living amongst the peaks! Which is why I'd like you to get rid of it!

name: Slay the Giaprey!
quest-details: I chased off a Giaprey that was feeding on my Popos, but now it's back with 19 of its buddies! I can't take on the whole lot of them! Hunters, this is your chance! Please get rid of them for me!

name: Find the Mountain Herbs!
quest-details: Steeping Mountain Herbs in this special brew has miraculous medical effects. However, I've run out of the herbs essential to the concoction. Find 20 of them and bring them to me!

name: Hunt Down the Velocidrome!
quest-details: It seems that whenever my wife goes to pick mushrooms in the Jungle, a large carnivore appears! There's no way I can let her go pick mushrooms now... Please! Make the Jungle safe again!

name: Blue Menace of the Jungle
quest-details: I want you to hunt and kill the giant bird-like monster that has appeared in our jungle. It's wreaking havoc on our environment!

name: Cunning Raiders
quest-details: A group of blue scaled, pack hunting carnivores called Velociprey have infested the jungle. Please slay 20 of them for us... But beware of their boss!

name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
quest-details: My village is under attack by a swarm of bug monsters! It seems there are about 50 of them. One on one they are not a threat, but as a group they are deadly. So be careful.

name: The Mushroom Hunt!
quest-details: My doggie just looooves Special Mushrooms! I'd like you to bring me 20 of them, as I can't resist his puppy dog eyes. However, beware of that filthy pink vagrant brute!

name: Panning for Goldenfish
quest-details: I'd do anything to get my hands on some legendary Goldenfish! I'm begging you to bring me 2 of them! Wait! Make that 3! Please catch these fish and bring them here!

name: Hunt the Gendrome!
quest-details: My caravans are being hit by packs of Genprey. It appears there is an extraordinarily powerful boss among them! Hunt down the monster and make the roads safe again for all!

name: The Land Shark
quest-details: Our pack-animals were eaten by something in the desert. But nobody actually saw the monster attack! Track down this vile beast and take it out!

name: The Lurking Desert Giant
quest-details: When some of my clan went gathering in the desert, they were attacked by an enormous crab, nya! As long as he's around, we can't do business. Help us, nya!

name: Slay the Genprey!
quest-details: I'm too injured to go on... The Genprey living in the desert have the power to paralyze their foes. I'd like you to find the pack that did this to me and kill 20 of the fiends!

name: Liver of Legend!
quest-details: Hello sirs and madams! I deal in rare items that I find in the desert. Recently I've got a buyer for Piscine Wyvern and Sand Wyvern livers. Deliver 10 of them to me!

name: Gone Fishin'
quest-details: Fishing. It carries on in the hearts of children and remains a simple pleasure for adults. Hearken back to a simpler time and bring me back 3 of the desert's most precious gift... Goldenfish!

name: Attack of the Yian Kut-Ku
quest-details: That big eared Yian Kut-Ku really made mincemeat out of me! It's out of my league, so I want you to hunt it down for me! He's all yours!

name: Charge... Charge... Charge!
quest-details: We have a plan to rid the swamp of the scourge of the Bulldrome; however, we do not have enough hunters for the job. That is why we need your help! Let us rid the swamp of this foul beast!

name: The Mischief-maker
quest-details: I took a trip to the swamp and saw a pretty pink animal with fangs. But when I tried to call it to the carriage, it threw something dirty at me and now I can't get the smell off! Punish it!

name: The Ruler of the Snow
quest-details: As the representative of the Hunter's Guild, allow me to lay out our request. We would like you to hunt down the proud ruler of the mountains, the Blangonga... But you must be prepared!

name: Gathering - Swamp Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the swamp. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Gathering - Forest and Hills
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the forest and hills. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: Gathering - Volcanic Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the volcanic zone. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

name: The Ruler of the Snow
quest-details: As the representative of the Hunter's Guild, allow me to lay out our request. We would like you to hunt down the proud ruler of the mountains, the Blangonga... But you must be prepared!

name: The Shadow in the Cave
quest-details: We were exploring a cave near here, but stumbled on this disgusting blob-like monster! If you can't get rid of that thing, our research is doomed! Help us!

name: Red Shadow in the Snow
quest-details: I've always longed to venture into the snowy mountains! I think I could hunt down an Anteka, but I could never fight a wyvern. Maybe you could take care of a special monster for me...

name: Blango Slaying Tactics
quest-details: The pelt of a Blango can be made into various pieces of armor that are useful in everyday life. Slay 20 of the beasts and bring me their pelts. Beware of the Blangonga.

name: The Subterranean Glutton
quest-details: I'm after the rare larvae of the Khezu. They should be on the summit, so search there. These whelps aren't to be taken lightly. If you run out of Pickaxes, combine a bone with a rock!

name: Master of the Giant Lake
quest-details: Hunt down the water wyvern that keeps harassing my shipyard! Your target is a monster that can shoot water with incredible force, so beware! Heh heh heh!

name: The Pink Fur Party
quest-details: A huge group of Congas, along with one of their big pink bosses are gathering together. Please get rid of 20 of them... I think it will drive the rest away! Help me, pretty please!

name: The Hidden Jungle Clouds
quest-details: I thought dark clouds had covered the moon, but it was actually a swarm of Hornetaurs! The jungle is covered with the bugs and I need you to exterminate 50 of the Hornetaur pests!

name: The Underwater Terror
quest-details: The lake underneath the desert is connected to an underground river and patrolled by a green-scaled water wyvern... If you are truly a hunter, then it should pose no problem.

name: Evening Hermitaur Sonata
quest-details: Those pesky Hermitaurs are starting to get in the way of business. They hide in the sand and ambush you at a moment's notice. I also spotted a Daimyo Hermitaur, so be extremely careful!

name: The Purple Poison Menace
quest-details: I saw a gigantic bird-like monster deep in the swamp! It scared everyone so bad that I can't do business with a thing like that out there! Please hunt it down so I can work in peace!

name: Pincer through the Sky
quest-details: A Shogun Ceanataur is running rampant over the swamp zone! Whether it be human or animal, it is attacking everything in sight. Head to the swamp and end its reign of terror!

name: Chase the Poison Gypceros!
quest-details: The Gypceros is known to have a fondness for shiny objects. It is also known to occasionally steal ore from humans. Slaying a Gypceros may net you some great treasures.

name: Trouble in the Forest
quest-details: I'm a lumberjack and I'm not OK. Those boar-monsters, the Bullfangos, have been a lot of trouble lately. Can you thin the herd by 20? Much obliged.

name: Seeking the Strange Mask
quest-details: This is awful! The princess saw some strange masked monsters that made her run for the hills! We're sending troops on a hunt for the fiends, so track down the masked marauders!

name: The Ioprey Leader
quest-details: We were just in a fight with a pack of Ioprey, but were routed and had to retreat before we could defeat their leader. Hunt it down for us, but beware of its poison attacks.

name: Commander in the Flames
quest-details: Upon our trip into the cave at the volcano, an enormous Shogun Ceanataur dropped down from the ceiling right on top of us! Its ambush caused massive damage! Rid the world of that scourge!

name: Basarios: Unseen Peril
quest-details: A wyvern attacked my team from out of the blue while we were on an expedition to the Volcanic Belt. Where did it come from? Please slay it!

name: A Band of Ceanataurs
quest-details: I wanted to keep digging in search of the ultimate treasure trove... But some Ceanataurs smashed my Pickaxe! If you don't get rid of them, there will be no digging for me! Help me!

name: Great Ore Discovery
quest-details: In a corner of the volcanic belt, I discovered a great vein of coal in the rocks. I'd like you to mine the coal, but beware the Shogun Ceanataur! Take care and get mining!

name: A Giant Dragon Invades!
goal-condition: Defend the Fortress from Lao-Shan Lung
quest-details: A giant dragon has attacked our fort! If the fort falls, so too do our lands! Use its installed weaponry to make this beast pay for its indiscretions!

name: The Meeting of Daimyo
quest-details: Help! There has been an explosion of so many Daimyo Hermitaurs near our fishing grounds that we can't handle things by ourselves! Get rid of as many as you can so we can get back to fishing!

name: Go Fish Goldenfish!
quest-details: I've come from across the sands to sell all manners of strange and unusual wares, but I have a request. Please deliver to me 8 Goldenfish from the desert. I promise to reward you well!

name: Absolute Power
quest-details: At last, the Tigrex has appeared! It is said the beast's origins are as a flying wyvern. It is too powerful to be allowed to run free. The village is in danger! Hunt it quickly!

name: Absolute Power
quest-details: At last, the Tigrex has appeared! It is said the beast's origins are as a flying wyvern. It is too powerful to be allowed to run free. The village is in danger! Hunt it quickly!

name: The Tigrex's Roar
quest-details: I have an urgent request from a hunter on an expedition in the desert! It seems he has encountered the mighty Tigrex! Go to his aid and crush this beast at once!

name: The Runaway Diablos
quest-details: A giant wyvern smashed the border-wall and ran into this area. We need to find and kill it before it causes any more trouble!

name: The Fierce Black Horn
quest-details: I had hired the most skilled hunters imaginable, and went on a safari for the famed Diablos... But what we found was no mere Diablos! We must slay that black horned wyvern! No matter what!

name: Valor in the Swamp Zone
quest-details: Even in the relative calm of the swamp zone, something has stirred up the monsters. In particular, heavily armored wyverns have been attacking us. Can you help us out?

name: Terror of the Gravios
quest-details: A fearsome Gravios has appeared amidst the magma and desolation of the Volcanic Belt. Hunt down the fire breather for us!

name: The King's Domain
quest-details: Did you hear it!? That voice that shook the ground? It even scared the fearless mercenaries! It must have been the king of the skies! But if you're a real hunter, it won't be a problem!

name: Attack of the Rathalos
quest-details: It cannot be... We tried so hard to kill it... But... My entire war band was wiped out by a wyvern. Now it all rests upon your shoulders, monster hunter! Slay it!

name: The Queen's Descent
quest-details: A Rathian is making its nest in the jungle. This protective mother has made even stepping into the jungle a death sentence. Please clear the jungle of her threat.

name: The Cherry Blossom Rathian
quest-details: A remarkably fierce Pink Rathian has rampaged through lands held by other monsters and caused a great upheaval. You must hunt down and eliminate her to restore order!

name: The Legendary Kirin
quest-details: That must have been the phantom beast... The faint glow, and how it seemed to glide over land... There's no doubt that amazing riches await its slayer!

name: The Red and Green Wyverns
quest-details: I must gather Herbs from the hillside if I am to cure my mother's illness. However, a fire breathing wyvern has settled into the area... If I do nothing, mama will only get worse. Please! Help me!

name: Attack of the Wind Dragon
quest-details: A brown metal dragon is rapidly closing on the town. Scouts report that outlying areas have already been razed. If we don't stop this dragon, our town will be annihilated! We need you!

name: A Sun with Fangs
quest-details: While in the secluded desert village, I spotted an elder dragon with red scales! While I do know some hunters, it would be wrong to make this request of them... So it's up to you!

name: Emperor of Flame
quest-details: I have an earnest request of you... As the last of my responsibilities, I request your help. I want you to fight the elder fire dragon we cornered in the Volcanic Belt, but beware its flames!

name: Towards the Silence
quest-details: It seems an unknown elder dragon has appeared in the swamp zone. However, no one truly got a clear look at it. What could the beast have been? Slay it, but proceed with caution!

name: Two Little Shadows
quest-details: I was exploring the caverns with my assistants when two small, white shadows popped out of nowhere. Please do something about them as they are hindering my research! ...Actually, what are they??

name: A Horde of Congalalas
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: Large Congalalas continue to gather, and at this rate, they'll completely trash the Swamp and affect our town's way of life. I'm not asking that you get rid of them all, but even 2 would help!

name: The Approaching Gaoren
goal-condition: Defend the Fortress from Shen Gaoren
quest-details: Hmm... This is quite serious. The fort which lies at the heart of our defenses is under siege by a giant monster. We need your strength to hold our position!

name: Gathering - Snowy Mountains
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A nighttime gathering quest in the snowy mountains. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Be careful! Large monsters lurk nearby!

name: Gathering - Jungle Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A nighttime gathering quest in the jungle. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Be careful! Large monsters lurk nearby!

name: Gathering - Desert Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A nighttime gathering quest in the desert. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Be careful! Large monsters lurk nearby!

name: A True Foe - The Giadrome!
quest-details: Within a group of the sly carnivorous Giaprey, there is a leader. They call it the Giadrome. I need a hunter's strength to show that pack of beasts and their leader who's boss!

name: Reckless Bulldrome Hunter
quest-details: My son decided to become a hunter and ran off after a Bulldrome on his own! Of course, now the tables have turned and I'm worried! Hunt down the Bulldrome on the snowy mountains!

name: Flanked by Velocidrome
quest-details: All the children in the village have gathered their allowances to pay you to get rid of two carnivores. Our parents couldn't do it, so it's up to you to defend our fields and animals!

name: Aim for the Jungle Crab
quest-details: I've always longed to go hunting in the jungle! However, if a huge monster appeared, I'd be finished! Maybe you could take out the Daimyo Hermitaur for me?

name: The Poison Fanged Duo
quest-details: There appears to be two Gendrome among the pack of Genprey ravaging the desert. This has caused the Genprey to become frenzied and attack humans. You must get rid of the leaders!

name: Pursuit of the Sand Wyvern
quest-details: A giant sand wyvern has appeared in the desert along with a pack of Genprey. Forget about the Genprey, but take care of the Cephadrome so the merchants can return to work!

name: Ultimate Crab Dinner
quest-details: I am a true connoisseur of crab cuisine, and as such a connoisseur, I suspect the Daimyo Hermitaurs found in the desert are incredibly tasty! One is never enough, so hunt down two!

name: Trapped by Yian Kut-Ku
goal-condition: Hunt the Yian Kut-Ku and Blue Yian Kut-Ku
quest-details: The Yian Kut-Ku are circling, screaming in their shrill voices. Everyone is trapped inside the town! Please do something!

name: Conga Counterattack!
quest-details: I asked some hunters to slay a Congalala for me; however, they met defeat at the hooves of a Bulldrome. I didn't think it would come to this, but I need your help!

name: The Beating of Royal Wings
quest-details: It's no use. No matter where I look, I can't seem to find the Vespoid Queen! Perhaps if you slayed a large number of Vespoids to make her feel that her swarm was in grave danger, she might appear...

name: Lao-Shan Lung Draws Near!
goal-condition: Defend the Fortress from Lao-Shan Lung
quest-details: It seems that once again our land is in crisis. The giant elder dragon Lao-Shan Lung is approaching the village from the mountains. Head to the fort and defend our way of life!

name: Gathering - Swamp Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A nighttime gathering quest in the swamp. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Be careful! Large monsters lurk nearby!

name: Gathering - Forest and Hills
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the forest and hills. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Be careful! Large monsters lurk nearby!

name: Gathering - Volcanic Zone
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A nighttime gathering quest in the volcanic zone. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Be careful! Large monsters lurk nearby!

name: Two Roars in the Snow
quest-details: It happened in an instant... Two Blangongas destroyed all the trees around my house. Now all I want to do is hunt them down so I can get my revenge. Please help me!

name: The King of the Mountains
quest-details: A Blangonga has staked its claim to a piece of the snowy mountains. Now we can't enter the area to gather firewood. Exterminate the Blangonga!

name: The Electrified Wyvern
quest-details: I wanted to test myself, so I went off in search of spotting a Bulldrome in the snowy mountains. But all of a sudden, a weird wyvern appeared and it shocked me! I'm still smoking!

name: Red Shadow in the Swampland
quest-details: I've always longed to venture into the swamp! I think I could hunt down a Kelbi, but I could never fight a wyvern. Maybe you'd take care of this special monster for me...

name: The Poison Gas
goal-condition: Hunt the Gypceros and Purple Gypceros
quest-details: *cough* While I was practicing in the jungle, I was attacked by two poison wyverns! You can see their thick poison gas before your very eyes... They are tough, please defeat them! *cough*

name: Dual Plesioth
goal-condition: Hunt the Plesioth and Green Plesioth
quest-details: The water wyvern known as Plesioth is raging in the jungle. And not just one of them! Head off immediately to slay them!

name: Attack of the Rathian
quest-details: My caravan was wiped out by the queen of the skies, the killer Rathian! I'll pay you whatever you ask if you hunt down that foul creature! Help me kind hunter, you're my only hope!

name: Water Wyvern in the Desert
quest-details: I found a giant water wyvern in a cave in the desert! I can't defeat it because it stays underwater. Slay it for me and the glory is all yours!

name: The Underwater Terror
quest-details: The lake underneath the desert is connected to an underground river and patrolled by a green-scaled water wyvern... If you are truly a hunter, then it should pose no problem.

name: An Evening Soaked in Poison
quest-details: The swamp's poison is mixing with the Iodrome's poison... It is a terrible scene! We need a professional hunter to assist us... Show us your skills!

name: Supreme Ruler of the Swamp
quest-details: Hunters! It is time to hunt down the Shogun Ceanataur. Let us rid the swamp zone of this menace and expand our strategic possibilities. This is a highly classified hunt. So don't tell a soul!

name: The Purple Poison Menace
quest-details: I saw a gigantic bird-like monster deep in the swamp! It scared everyone so bad that I can't do business with a thing like that out there! Please hunt it down so I can work in peace!

name: Eliminate the Rathalos!
quest-details: I request the assistance of only the bravest of hunters to find and hunt the Rathalos that has appeared near here. Of course, a handsome reward will be paid upon success.

name: The Shogun's Encampment
quest-details: Hey! Hey! Have you heard the news!? There's a rumor that two enormous monsters with thick shells have appeared in the Volcanic Belt! There must be a hunter somewhere who can face them!

name: Basarios: Unseen Peril
quest-details: A wyvern attacked my team from out of the blue while we were on an expedition to the Volcanic Belt. Where did it come from? Please slay it!

name: Envoy to Disaster
quest-details: The volcano has erupted with a deluge of black snake-like wyverns. They are the envoys to disaster. Hunt 20 of these Remobras down and appease the mountain gods.

name: Lao-Shan Lung Draws Near!
goal-condition: Defend the Fortress from Lao-Shan Lung
quest-details: It seems that once again our land is in crisis. The giant elder dragon Lao-Shan Lung is approaching the village from the mountains. Head to the fort and defend our way of life!

name: Meeting of the Blangongas
quest-details: It-it-it's awful! A group of Blangongas are gathering on the mountain! With all those brutes in one spot, it means trouble for the village! Please help us!

name: The White Brute
quest-details: We came to this land seeking the fabled Kirin, and at last we had found it! But the heavens opened and lightning struck, scattering our team. We need your help to save our co-workers!

name: Pricy Mushrooms, Shaka!
quest-details: Have you ever heard of "Select Mushrooms"? Collect just 3 of them and you'll be rich beyond belief! Although I have heard that the King Shakalaka keeps a tight watch over those things...

name: Twin Walls of the Jungle
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Oh, the atmosphere is abuzz, and the land tells me of the monsters' fury! Great Hunter, I call upon you to put a stop to the Blue Yian Kut-Ku and the Rathian that appears after it falls!

name: The Meeting of Sea and Air
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Oh me, oh my! A Daimyo Hermitaur and a Green Plesioth have both appeared in the same area. I'm in search of a hunter who'll rid me of them one by one. Won't anyone step forward?

name: Red Lightning, Violet Blade
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: A Khezu and a Shogun Ceanataur have descended upon the swampland and are really going at it! If we don't put an end to them quick, we may end up with a lot of casualties! Heeeeelp!

name: Land of the Tremors
quest-details: A group of highly skilled hunters went off to slay two Tigrex, but they became the hunted. Please destroy the two Tigrex and open a clear route for our rescue team.

name: Land of the Tremors
quest-details: A group of highly skilled hunters went off to slay two Tigrex, but they became the hunted. Please destroy the two Tigrex and open a clear route for our rescue team.

name: The Rajang in the Snow
quest-details: I had never seen the fanged beast with two horns on its head before, and I never want to again with the way it was rampaging across the snow!

name: The Tigrex's Roar
quest-details: I have an urgent request from a hunter on an expedition in the desert! It seems he has encountered the mighty Tigrex! Go to his aid and crush this beast at once!

name: Pink Dance in the Jungle
quest-details: I've always longed to be a hunter, but a meeting with a Rathian ended that! Now that I know what it takes, I'll start over, but you have the spirit to hunt down that Rathian!

name: The Runaway Diablos
quest-details: A giant wyvern smashed the border-wall and ran into this area. We need to find and kill it before it causes any more trouble!

name: Four Horns
goal-condition: Hunt the Diablos and Black Diablos
quest-details: I simply can't bear to think about the terror and pain those Diablos are causing my people. I can't sleep at night with that worry! Hunt down those 2 Diablos for me!

name: Rajang of Mountain Flames
quest-details: I went up to the snowy mountains to view the aurora, but the truth is that I hate the cold! That's when it hit me! I should have a coat made from Rajang fur! Hunt one for me!

name: Terror of the Gravios
quest-details: A fearsome Gravios has appeared amidst the magma and desolation of the Volcanic Belt. Hunt down the fire breather for us!

name: Black Rock in the Swamp
quest-details: Even in the relative calm of the swamp zone, something has stirred up the monsters. In particular, heavily armored wyverns have been attacking us. Can you help us out?

name: A Troublesome Pair
quest-details: A Rathalos and Rathian have paired up and are ravaging my country! I wanted to end their reign of terror, but my father will not allow it! Please! Defeat them for me!

name: Blue Sky, Pink Earth
goal-condition: Hunt the Azure Rathalos and the Pink Rathian
quest-details: Did you see the two wyverns that appeared in the hills? An azure-shelled Rathalos and a pink-scaled Rathian... Hunting them down would surely make you a top hunter! ...Try your luck?

name: Attack of the Rathalos
quest-details: It cannot be... We tried so hard to kill it... But... My entire war band was wiped out by a wyvern. Now it all rests upon your shoulders, monster hunter! Slay it!

name: Deny the Silver Rathalos
quest-details: I have a request to all excellent hunters. I would like you to hunt down the silver wyvern that lives in the forgotten tower. OK... You don't even have to be excellent.

name: Find the Golden Phantom
quest-details: All of my rations were gone and I was fading out of consciousness when out of the corner of my eye I saw ancient ruins and a golden wyvern up above. Was it all a dream? Find the truth!

name: The Fleeting Shadow
quest-details: I saw them! I really did! The ground was bathed in sparks as two phantom beasts bathed in a lava pool! It was not a dream! You've gotta believe me! Go see for yourself!

name: The Elder Dragon of Wind
quest-details: There was surely a vortex inside of that downpour. The wind wrapped around and revealed the elder dragon, Kushala Daora! There isn't a single soul who can combat it alone, so fight together!

name: The Frozen Dictator
quest-details: I saw it! I saw it! In the middle of a blinding snow storm, there it was; dark black wings were dancing in the sky... No mere human could stand up to it! Don't even think of hunting it!

name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
quest-details: Our intuition told us to turn around, but we thought no one was there... Yet even though no one should've been there, we were attacked from behind! Beware! It was an enemy never before seen!

name: Towards the Silence
quest-details: It seems an unknown elder dragon has appeared in the swamp zone. However, no one truly got a clear look at it. What could the beast have been? Slay it, but proceed with caution!

name: The War of Immolation
quest-details: This is truly an emergency! A red fire-breathing dragon is approaching this very town! This is no time to dilly-dally! We need the help of every skilled hunter in this land!

name: Emperor of Flame
quest-details: I have an earnest request of you... As the last of my responsibilities, I request your help. I want you to fight the elder fire dragon we cornered in the Volcanic Belt, but beware its flames!

name: Legendary Black Dragon
quest-details: The legendary black dragon... It really exists then? We've prepared all instruments of war to assist you in your quest to destroy the dragon. The fate of the nation lies in your hands.

name: The End Times
quest-details: It appears the time has finally come. The bloodstained scales of the red dragon have graced the earth again in flaming glory. If you can stop this beast...

name: Ancestral Dragon
quest-details: Hee hee hee... The time has come. Here is your invitation to the ball. Wear your Sunday best and bring your greatest weapon, for it is time to go to the dance with the king of disaster.

name: Wyvern of the Wind
quest-details: The Nargacuga of the Great Forest... It's so fast, I could barely see it. But please, if there is one request that needs to be fulfilled, it's this one!

name: Born of Darkness
quest-details: All of my friends... gone. I saw a tail swish through the air, and 2 red lights. That's all. That thing's not a monster; it's a demon! Someone exorcise it, please!

name: Two Queens
goal-condition: Hunt the Rathian and the Pink Rathian
quest-details: Think you can handle two Rathian at the same time!? Then come on down to the Arena, the only place to test your might! We eagerly await your arrival, Hunter!

name: One-Horned Demon King
quest-details: Ah, I tried to slay it, but I was in way over my head. Still, I can't let it go, so I ask that if you have the courage to face this beast, to please step forward.

name: Phantasmic Battle
quest-details: I've received an urgent communique from my colleague who went to investigate deep inside the volcano. Please hurry, but be careful. The monster is a bit... unique.

name: Furious Beauties
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Wh-What's going on...? All of a sudden, a ton of monsters just showed up in the Snowy Mountains! Any hunter willing to lend a hand, please come help us on the hunt!

name: Fight for the Throne
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Help! There are some dangerous monsters lurking in the Forest and Hills, making it impossible for me to enter the area. But if I don't gather what I need, my mother's illness will...

name: Hotter than Hell Itself
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: We've received word that a Basarios and a Gravios are going wild inside due to volcanic activity. This is a very dire situation, and we require the immediate dispatch of a hunter.

name: Desert Unifier
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: My sister and I are in an argument over which is the most beautiful: Daimyo shells, Cephadrome scales, or Diablos horns. Seeing is believing, so I demand you bring all three to me!

name: The Approaching Gaoren
goal-condition: Defend the Town from Shen Gaoren
quest-details: Our town is embroiled in an unprecedented conflict. A fortress-like shelled monster is threatening our safety. We need help immediately!

name: Rise to the Summit
quest-details: The combined strength of the Hunter's Guild has successfully cornered an Akantor in the Volcanic Belt. Now all that is left is to slay the beast, a task for only the most valiant.

name: Hypno, Hypno!
quest-details: The Hypnocatrice is hurting so many people, so I tried to sneak out to the Great Forest. Unfortunately, I was spotted by a guard. Please, I ask that someone deal with that menace in my stead!

name: G-Lvl Gathering - Grt Forest
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the Great Forest. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Just be aware of the G-Level monsters, OK?

name: G-Lvl Gathering - Old Jungle
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the Old Jungle. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Just be aware of the G-Level monsters, OK?

name: G-Lvl Gathering - Old Desert
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the Old Desert. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Just be aware of the G-Level monsters, OK?

name: G-Lvl Gathering - Old Swamp
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the Old Swamp. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Just be aware of the G-Level monsters, OK?

name: G-Lvl Gathering - Snowy Mts.
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the Snowy Mountains. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Just be aware of the G-Level monsters, OK?

name: Shakalaka Showdown!
quest-details: This time, I need a hunter to come with us as we go in search of treasure in the heart of the Great Forest. More specifically, I need you to be on the look-out for Shakalakas as we travel.

name: The Beating of Royal Wings
quest-details: It's no use. No matter where I look, I can't seem to find the Vespoid Queen! Perhaps if you slayed a large number of Vespoids to make her feel that her swarm was in grave danger, she might appear...

name: The Big Dirt Nap
quest-details: The Hypnocatrice, the sleep-inducing bird wyvern of the Great Forest. Those who face it usually end up taking a dirt nap, so its materials are highly coveted. So... You gonna give it a shot?

name: Hypno, Hypno!
quest-details: The Hypnocatrice is hurting so many people, so I tried to sneak out to the Great Forest. Unfortunately, I was spotted by a guard. Please, I ask that someone deal with that menace in my stead!

name: Trapped by Yian Kut-Ku
goal-condition: Hunt the Yian Kut-Ku and Blue Yian Kut-Ku
quest-details: The Yian Kut-Ku are circling, screaming in their shrill voices. Everyone is trapped inside the town! Please do something!

name: Giant Crab of the Old Jungle
quest-details: We came here to the Old Jungle in search of some materials when a giant crab chased us out of the area, nya! We can't make a living as long as that cretin is there. Please help us, nya!!

name: Daimyo of Sengoku Fame
quest-details: I spotted an unusual variety of Daimyo Hermitaur out in the Old Desert. I don't know what it was, but I swear it was evil! Anyway, here's my proposition: Hunt the crab and make a fortune. Deal?

name: Wag the Dog!
goal-condition: Hunt the Daimyo Hermitaur and the Plum D.Hermitaur
quest-details: My grandfather stumbled on a fight between two famous warriors. They say that it's the dream of a warrior to die on the battlefield, but not by their own hands! Please go and help them!

name: Old Jungle Lightning
quest-details: Just when I thought that maybe this time the peace would last, this happens! As long as that Khezu just sits there, we can't get out of the Old Jungle. Please, come to our rescue, hunter!

name: Red Shadow in the Snow
quest-details: I've always longed to venture into the Snowy Mountains! I think I could hunt down an Anteka, but I could never fight a wyvern. Maybe you could take care of a special monster for me...

name: Tales from the Old Swamp
quest-details: Ever since a long time ago, 2 gruesome wyverns have lived in the depths of the cave in the Old Swamp, their blood-red bodies surrounded in a sharp, blue glow... *gasp!* Look, behind you!

name: Eyes in the Underground Lake
quest-details: The Plesioth of the Old Desert's underground lake... We've received an SOS from the group of secret hunters who were hunting this beast. Can you keep the Plesioth at bay while we rescue them?

name: Giant Green Waves of Verdure
quest-details: Help! I've received word that a Green Plesioth has appeared along our Queen's route to another land. Please take care of it in secret for us before she enters the area!

name: Prodigal Pack Attack!
quest-details: Congas have gathered in the Swamp and are destroying all the good mining points. Now, I'd hate for this to leak, but there's a great mining point in a secret place. Just keep that mum, OK?

name: Pelagus Pride
quest-details: Hmph, how rude! Can you believe that awful beast spewed some nasty gunk at me three times in a row!? ...I beg your pardon? I still stink!? How dare you, you uncouth heathen!?

name: Trickster!
quest-details: There is a child wandering lost deep in the Great Forest. Our rescue efforts have thus far failed due to a strange and rare, bearded beast... I ask that someone please hunt that thing down!

name: Stealing in the Jungle!
quest-details: That Gypceros stole my very important Book of Combos, and then, right after that, a band of Melynx stole my BBQ Spit! At this rate, I'm going to be forced into early retirement! Heeeeelp!

name: Old Swamp, Shrouded in Mist
quest-details: Gypceros are covered in a rubbery skin that's mostly waterproof, yet despite this, they like to live in areas of high humidity. Hmm... To solve this riddle, I'll require more data!

name: Subspecies Three!
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Add a Blue Yian Kut-Ku to a Green Plesioth and you get a Plum D.Hermitaur. Seriously, uniquely-colored equipment is selling like hotcakes, especially with young folks. Wish I could get in on that.

name: Predators of the Swamp
goal-condition: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quest-details: Recently, the number of people disappearing in the swamplands has been on the rise and we think the reason is linked to monsters in the area. If you can, please help look into this for us.

name: Ever-Present Shadow
quest-details: I saw a demon in the Great Forest so fast that I could barely even register its shadow as it flew by. My trusty partner is my sword, and I hate to beg, but I need some backup here!

name: G-Lvl Gathering - Frst&Hills
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A daytime gathering quest in the Great Forest. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Just be aware of the G-Level monsters, OK?

name: G-Lvl Gathering - OldVolcano
goal-condition: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quest-details: A gathering quest in the Old Jungle. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up. Just be aware of the G-Level monsters, OK?

name: Ever-Present Shadow
